title: anomos #0460
definition:
1) without the law, without the knowledge of the law
 2) to sin in ignorance of the Mosaic law
 3) live ignorant of law and discipline
nasbUsage:

 2) to sin in ignorance of the Mosaic law
 3) live ignorant of law and discipline
